notes: Aggregated petroleum royalty receipts are not published as a single line item; they are split across WA (Department of Mines, Industry Regulation and Safety), QLD (QLD Treasury / Resources), NT (NT Treasury), SA (Department for Energy and Mining) and Commonwealth onshore royalty arrangements (North West Shelf shared with WA). No single CSV or XLSX aggregates these series. Hand-keying requires pulling each state's published royalty receipts from annual state budget papers and adding them with explicit accounting. Leave unavailable until a documented reconciliation is available. Do not add state royalty totals to PRRT without clear labelling.
